Uses of Record Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.Location

Packages that use Location
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser
This package contains the parser for .key and .proof files.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof
This package contains the core data structures of proofs, nodes, goals, as well as machinery to deal with these data structures.
de.uka.ilkd.key.scripts
Proof script commands are a simple proof automation facility.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.parsing

  • Uses of Location in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml with parameters of type Location
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ImmutableSet<LabeledParserRuleContext>
    JMLSpecExtractor.createNonNullPositionedString(String varName, KeYJavaType kjt, boolean isImplicitVar, Location location, Services services)
    creates a JML specification expressing that the given variable/field is not null and in case of a reference array type that also its elements are non-null In case of implicit fields or primitive typed fields/variables the empty set is returned

  • Uses of Location in de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation
